examples: Let us not cavil too much.
I don't think this is the time to cavil at the wording of the report.
A carper will cavil at anything.
Surely some in the left-wing governments that run Europe today will continue to cavil against such a "destabilizing" initiative.
When Olivier Cavil took over as vice president of communications in 2009 he wanted to create a new look that matched the ideals of the brand.
